nodes.name: 乌卡亚利大区
nodes.summary: 乌卡亚利大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括红紋鬚鴷、Fiery-capped manakin、Fiery-throated fruiteater等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 红紋鬚鴷
nodes.summary: 红紋鬚鴷（Scarlet-banded barbet，学名 Capito wallacei），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于乌卡亚利大区，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: (It was mistakenly listed as being in Ucayali, Peru, in its formal description.) There it inhabits humid, mossy, sub-montane and montane forest at elevations between

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: (It was mistakenly listed as being in Ucayali, Peru, in its formal description.) There it inhabits humid, mossy, sub-montane and montane forest at elevations between
